zh.lifeSummary: 當Ricarda von Geldern於1221年出生在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德時，她的父親Gerhard III. von Geldern36歲，母親Margaretha van Brabant29歲。她於1250年與Wilhelm IV. von Jülich結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1293年在海因里希_海普洛文次享年72歲，埋葬在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫迪倫乃德根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ricarda von Geldern于1221年出生在荷兰蓋爾德藍德时，她的父亲Gerhard III. von Geldern36岁，母亲Margaretha van Brabant29岁。她于1250年与Wilhelm IV. von Jülich结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1293年在海因里希_海普洛文次享年72岁，埋葬在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫迪倫乃德根。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Geldern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northern England usually a variant of Geldard, an occupational name from Middle English gelde ‘sterile, barren’, used as a noun to denote ‘gelded cattle’, + Old English hierde, hence ‘herdman who tends the gelded cattle’.
English: alternatively, perhaps an occupational name from Middle English gelder(e) ‘gelder, castrator (of livestock)’.

variants.name: Gilder
meanings: English (Essex and Middlesex): occupational name for a goldsmith or gilder, from Middle English gilder, gelder, guldar, a derivative of Old English gyldan ‘to gild’.

nameMeanings.name: Ricarda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Ricarda von Geldern was born in 1221, in Zutphen, Gelderland, Netherlands, her father, Gerhard III. von Geldern, was 36 and her mother, Margaretha van Brabant, was 29. She married Wilhelm IV. von Jülich in 1250. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1293, in Rhineland, Prussia, at the age of 72, and was buried in Nideggen, Düren, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ricarda von Geldern est née en 1221, à Zutphen, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, son père, Gerhard III. von Geldern, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaretha van Brabant, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Wilhelm IV. von Jülich en 1250. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1293, à Rhénanie, Prusse, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Nideggen, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.Aachen, Aachener Reich, Holy Roman Empir: Aachen, Aachener Reich, Heiliges Römisches Reich
de.lifeSummary: Als Ricarda von Geldern 1221 in Zutphen, Geldern, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gerhard III. von Geldern 36 und ihre Mutter Margaretha van Brabant 29. Sie hat 1250 Wilhelm IV. von Jülich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1293 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Rheinprovinz, Preußen und wurde in Nideggen, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ricarda von Geldern è nata il nel 1221 nel Zutphen, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Gerhard III. von Geldern, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Margaretha van Brabant, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Wilhelm IV. von Jülich nel 1250. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1293, nel Rheinprovinz, Preußen, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Nideggen, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania.

ko.lifeSummary: Ricarda von Geldern(이)가 1221년 네덜란드 글델랜드 주트프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerhard III. von Geldern(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaretha van Brabant(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1250년 Wilhelm IV. von Jülich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1293년 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 드u런 나이데겐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ricarda von Geldern nasceu em 1221, em Zutphen, Gheldria, Países Baixos, seu pai, Gerhard III. von Geldern, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaretha van Brabant, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Wilhelm IV. von Jülich em 1250. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1293, em Rheinprovinz, Preußen, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Nideggen, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha.

ru.Aachen, Aachener Reich, Holy Roman Empir: аачэн, аачэнир раич, хилигесь рoмищесь раич
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ricarda von Geldern родилась в 1221 г. в местности зутфен, джелдирланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Gerhard III. von Geldern было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaretha van Brabant, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Wilhelm IV. von Jülich в 1250 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1293 г. в местности раинпровинз, Пруссия в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности нидеген, дuрен, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.

Se casó con Wilhelm IV. von Jülich en 1250. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1293, en Rheinprovinz, Preußen, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Nideggen, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania.
